test_name: No duplicate found — unique identity keys, no match

No other lead exists with mobile=9876543210 or any matching identity key
test_steps: POST /api/v1/leads/{lead_id_001}/duplicate-check with body {} and Authorization: Bearer <rm_anita_jwt>
Assert HTTP 200
Assert response envelope: data.duplicate_status = 'none', data.matches = []
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM duplicate_matches WHERE lead_id = '{lead_id_001}' — expect 0
Query DB: SELECT duplicate_status FROM leads WHERE lead_id = '{lead_id_001}' — expect 'none'
expected_result: HTTP 200; body = {"data":{"duplicate_status":"none","matches":[]},"meta":{},"error":null}; 0 rows in duplicate_matches for this lead
postconditions: No audit_logs row created for this check

test_name: Same PAN + same mobile — strong block returns 409 CONFLICT
preconditions: Lead LD-2026-000002 exists with pan_token='ABCDE1234F_hashed', mobile='9911002200', stage='captured'
Lead LD-2026-000003 is the lead under check, also with pan_token='ABCDE1234F_hashed', mobile='9911002200'
BM user 'bm_raj@branch01.lms' owns both leads in branch-01
No override_reason provided in request body
test_steps: POST /api/v1/leads/{lead_id_003}/duplicate-check with body {"requested_action":"block"} and Authorization: Bearer <bm_raj_jwt>
Assert HTTP 409
Assert response error.code = 'CONFLICT'
Assert response error.detail.reason = 'DUPLICATE_BLOCKED'
Assert response error.detail.matches[0].confidence = 'strong'
Assert response error.detail.matches[0].matched_on contains 'pan_token' and 'mobile'
Assert response error.detail.override_allowed_by contains ['BM','SM']
Query DB: SELECT duplicate_status FROM leads WHERE lead_id = '{lead_id_003}' — expect 'none' (unchanged)
expected_result: HTTP 409; error.code='CONFLICT'; error.detail.reason='DUPLICATE_BLOCKED'; error.detail.matches[0].confidence='strong'; leads.duplicate_status unchanged='none'

test_name: Data integrity — override_reason must be populated when action=overridden
preconditions: BM performs a valid override on a strong-match duplicate

After success, run invariant query

test_data.override_reason: Verified same customer second product application

expected_result: Invariant query returns 0 rows
postconditions: All overridden duplicate_matches rows have non-null action_by and non-empty action_reason

di_meta.setup_sql: INSERT INTO leads ... (seed strong-match pair); POST override via API
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM duplicate_matches WHERE action = 'overridden' AND (action_by IS NULL OR action_reason IS NULL OR action_reason = '')
di_meta.cleanup: DELETE FROM duplicate_matches WHERE lead_id IN (SELECT lead_id FROM leads WHERE lead_code LIKE 'LD-TEST-%')

test_name: Data integrity — no orphaned duplicate_matches after lead soft-delete
preconditions: A duplicate_matches row exists for lead-A and lead-B
test_steps: Soft-delete lead-A by setting deleted_at (simulate via admin operation)
Run orphan invariant query
expected_result: Invariant query returns 0 rows (CASCADE constraint deletes duplicate_matches on hard delete; soft-delete must not leave FK-violated rows if hard-deleted)
postconditions: No duplicate_matches referencing a hard-deleted lead

di_meta.setup_sql: INSERT INTO leads (lead_id, ...) VALUES ('lead-A-uuid', ...); INSERT INTO duplicate_matches (lead_id, matched_lead_id, ...) VALUES ('lead-A-uuid', 'lead-B-uuid', ...)
di_meta.action: UPDATE leads SET deleted_at = now() WHERE lead_id = 'lead-A-uuid'
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT dm.duplicate_match_id FROM duplicate_matches dm LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.lead_id = dm.lead_id AND l.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE l.lead_id IS NULL
di_meta.cleanup: DELETE FROM leads WHERE lead_id IN ('lead-A-uuid','lead-B-uuid')

test_name: BM merges duplicate lead into master — all child records re-parented atomically
preconditions: Lead LD-2026-000020 (master) and LD-2026-000021 (duplicate) exist in branch-01, both stage='captured', duplicate_status='flagged'
Duplicate LD-2026-000021 has 3 documents, 2 consent_records, 2 tasks
Master LD-2026-000020 has 2 documents, 1 consent_record
open duplicate_matches row exists for this pair
BM 'bm_raj@branch01.lms' is authenticated
test_steps: POST /api/v1/leads/{lead_id_021}/merge with body {"master_lead_id":"{lead_id_020}","reason":"Verified same applicant, mobile updated","field_precedence":"master","expected_version":1} and Authorization: Bearer <bm_raj_jwt>
Assert HTTP 200
Assert data.duplicate_status = 'merged'
Assert data.master_lead_id = lead_id_020
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE lead_id='{lead_id_021}' — expect 0
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE lead_id='{lead_id_020}' — expect 5
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consent_records WHERE lead_id='{lead_id_021}' — expect 0
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consent_records WHERE lead_id='{lead_id_020}' — expect 3
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE lead_id='{lead_id_021}' AND status NOT IN ('done','cancelled') — expect 0
Query DB: SELECT attribution_status FROM source_attributions WHERE source_attribution_id=(SELECT source_attribution_id FROM leads WHERE lead_id='{lead_id_021}') — expect 'merged_into'

Query DB: SELECT status, action FROM duplicate_matches WHERE (lead_id='{lead_id_021}' AND matched_lead_id='{lead_id_020}') OR (lead_id='{lead_id_020}' AND matched_lead_id='{lead_id_021}') — expect status='resolved', action='merged'
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs WHERE action='lead_merge' AND entity_id='{lead_id_020}' AND detail->>'duplicate_lead_id'='{lead_id_021}' — expect 1
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_outbox WHERE event_code='LEAD_STAGE_CHANGED' AND aggregate_id='{lead_id_020}' — expect >= 1
expected_result: HTTP 200; duplicate lead has duplicate_status='merged', master_lead_id set; all 3 duplicate docs, 2 consents, 2 tasks re-parented to master; source_attribution.attribution_status='merged_into'; duplicate_matches resolved; audit_logs lead_merge entry; outbox event emitted
postconditions: duplicate lead: duplicate_status='merged', master_lead_id set, 0 documents/consents/open tasks

test_name: BM unmerges within configured window — child records restored
preconditions: Merge of LD-2026-000021 into LD-2026-000020 was completed < MERGE_UNMERGE_WINDOW_HOURS ago
BM 'bm_raj@branch01.lms' is authenticated
test_steps: POST /api/v1/leads/{lead_id_021}/unmerge with body {"reason":"Merge was incorrect, different customers"} and Authorization: Bearer <bm_raj_jwt>
Assert HTTP 200
Assert data.duplicate_status = 'none'
Assert data.master_lead_id = null
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE lead_id='{lead_id_021}' — expect 3 (originally re-parented docs restored)
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE lead_id='{lead_id_020}' — expect 2 (only originals remain)
Query DB: SELECT attribution_status FROM source_attributions WHERE source_attribution_id=(SELECT source_attribution_id FROM leads WHERE lead_id='{lead_id_021}') — expect 'original'
Query DB: SELECT status FROM duplicate_matches WHERE (lead_id='{lead_id_021}' OR matched_lead_id='{lead_id_021}') — expect 'open' (re-opened)
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs WHERE action='lead_unmerge' AND entity_id='{lead_id_020}' — expect 1
expected_result: HTTP 200; lead-021 reverts to duplicate_status='none', master_lead_id=null; re-parented documents return to lead-021; duplicate_matches re-opened; audit_logs lead_unmerge written

test_name: Unmerge blocked after window expires — 403 FORBIDDEN

BM 'bm_raj@branch01.lms' is authenticated

expected_result: HTTP 403; error.code='FORBIDDEN'; leads.duplicate_status remains 'merged'; no child records moved
postconditions: No DB changes; lead-021 remains in merged state

test_name: Transaction rollback — mid-merge failure leaves both leads unmodified

Two valid flagged leads in branch-01
test_steps: POST /api/v1/leads/{lead_id_021}/merge with valid BM payload

Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE lead_id='{lead_id_021}' — expect original count (3, not 0)
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs WHERE action='lead_merge' — expect 0 new rows
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_outbox WHERE event_code='LEAD_STAGE_CHANGED' AND aggregate_id='{lead_id_020}' AND created_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '1 minute' — expect 0
expected_result: Full transaction rollback; both leads retain pre-merge state; no partial writes to any table

Assert data.stage = 'captured' (not moved to 'assigned' since unallocated)

Query DB: SELECT owner_id, stage FROM leads WHERE lead_id=data.lead_id — expect owner_id=null, stage='captured'
Check application logs for 'allocation.no_match' warning entry with lead_id
expected_result: HTTP 201; lead created with owner_id=null, stage='captured'; event_outbox LEAD_ASSIGNED with owner_id=null; application log warns allocation.no_match
postconditions: event_outbox: LEAD_ASSIGNED row with owner_id=null payload

Both rules active; lead product_code='SBL'
test_steps: POST /api/v1/leads with body {"name":"Business Lead","mobile":"9599887766","product_code":"SBL","source":"DSA","branch_id":"branch-01-uuid"} and Authorization: Bearer <bm_raj_jwt>
Assert HTTP 201
Assert data.owner_id = rm_specialist_uuid (rule A wins)
Assert data.allocation_reason contains rule A's id or 'specialist'
expected_result: HTTP 201; owner_id=rm_specialist_uuid (rule A at priority 1 selected, rule B not evaluated)

test_name: Data integrity — every assigned lead has sla_first_contact_due_at set

test_steps: Run invariant query after 5 allocation operations
expected_result: Invariant query returns 0 rows

di_meta.setup_sql: Seed leads and allocation rules; trigger auto-allocation via POST /api/v1/leads
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT lead_id FROM leads WHERE stage = 'assigned' AND sla_first_contact_due_at IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
di_meta.cleanup: DELETE FROM leads WHERE lead_code LIKE 'LD-TEST-%'

test_name: Data integrity — audit_logs and stage_history created in same transaction for reassign
preconditions: BM performs a valid reassign
test_steps: POST /api/v1/leads/{lead_id}/reassign with valid BM payload
Run invariant query to confirm no audit_log without matching stage_history
expected_result: Invariant query returns 0 rows
postconditions: audit_logs reassign entry co-exists with stage_history assigned entry

di_meta.setup_sql: Seed lead in 'assigned' stage with owner=rm_mohan; seed target RM rm_deepa at available capacity
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT al.audit_id FROM audit_logs al LEFT JOIN stage_history sh ON sh.lead_id = al.lead_id AND sh.to_stage = 'assigned' AND sh.occurred_at BETWEEN al.created_at - INTERVAL '1 second' AND al.created_at + INTERVAL '1 second' WHERE al.action IN ('allocate', 'reassign') AND sh.stage_history_id IS NULL
di_meta.cleanup: DELETE FROM audit_logs WHERE action IN ('allocate','reassign') AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

test_name: Lead flagged as hot on create — high priority and amount above threshold
preconditions: ProductConfig for 'CAR' has hot_threshold=500000
No prior is_hot state on this new lead
test_steps: POST /api/v1/leads with body {"name":"Rajiv Singh","mobile":"9688774455","product_code":"CAR","source":"Referral","priority":"high","requested_amount":750000,"branch_id":"branch-01-uuid"} and Authorization: Bearer <bm_raj_jwt>
Assert HTTP 201
Assert data.is_hot = true
Assert data.score >= 25
Assert data.score_reasons is a non-empty array containing 'PRIORITY_HIGH'
Assert data.score_reasons contains 'AMOUNT_ABOVE_THRESHOLD'
Query DB: SELECT is_hot, score, score_reasons FROM leads WHERE lead_id=data.lead_id — is_hot=true, score>=25, score_reasons non-empty
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_outbox WHERE aggregate_id=data.lead_id AND event_code='HOT_LEAD' — expect 1
expected_result: HTTP 201; data.is_hot=true; data.score>=25; data.score_reasons contains 'PRIORITY_HIGH' and 'AMOUNT_ABOVE_THRESHOLD'; event_outbox HOT_LEAD emitted
postconditions: leads.is_hot=true, score>=25, score_reasons non-empty JSONB array

test_name: Lead cools — hot cleared when no rule fires after PATCH update
preconditions: Lead LD-2026-000040 exists with is_hot=true, score=35, score_reasons=['PRIORITY_HIGH','AMOUNT_ABOVE_THRESHOLD'], priority='high', requested_amount=750000
RM 'rm_anita@branch01.lms' owns the lead
test_steps: PATCH /api/v1/leads/{lead_id_040} with body {"priority":"normal","requested_amount":200000} and Authorization: Bearer <rm_anita_jwt>
Assert HTTP 200
Assert data.is_hot = false
Assert data.score_reasons contains 'COOLED'
Query DB: SELECT is_hot, score_reasons FROM leads WHERE lead_id='{lead_id_040}' — is_hot=false, score_reasons contains 'COOLED'
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_outbox WHERE aggregate_id='{lead_id_040}' AND event_code='HOT_LEAD' AND created_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '1 minute' — expect 0 (cool-down does NOT emit HOT_LEAD)
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.is_hot=false; score_reasons contains 'COOLED'; no HOT_LEAD outbox event emitted for cool-down transition

test_name: HOT_LEAD outbox emitted only on false→true transition, not on repeated hot evaluation
preconditions: Lead LD-2026-000041 is already is_hot=true, score=40
RM 'rm_anita@branch01.lms' owns the lead
test_steps: PATCH /api/v1/leads/{lead_id_041} with body {"priority":"high","requested_amount":900000} (still hot) and Authorization: Bearer <rm_anita_jwt>
Assert HTTP 200
Assert data.is_hot = true
Query DB: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_outbox WHERE aggregate_id='{lead_id_041}' AND event_code='HOT_LEAD' AND created_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '1 minute' — expect 0 (already hot, no new event)
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.is_hot=true; no new HOT_LEAD event in event_outbox (idempotent, already hot)
postconditions: event_outbox: no new HOT_LEAD rows from this update

test_name: Scoring error does not block lead create — lead saved with is_hot=false

Assert HTTP 201 (lead still created despite scoring error)
Assert data.is_hot = false
Assert data.score = null or absent
Query DB: SELECT is_hot, score FROM leads WHERE lead_id=data.lead_id — is_hot=false, score=null
Check application logs for scoring error at ERROR level (not in response body)
expected_result: HTTP 201; lead saved with is_hot=false, score=null; no 500 error returned; error logged at ERROR level in application logs
